title: Residential Support Worker
description:
This is a temporary, ad-hoc role with flexible shifts, including earlies, lates, sleep-ins, and waking nights.
You will support young people in the care system, helping them build independence and resilience while managing complex needs and risks.
Key Details: Pay £14.82 with uplifts for wake nights and weekends. Location Cranmer Bank, Leeds.
Key Responsibilities: Provide person-centred care and emotional support to young people, manage ligature risks, assist with routines and personal care, maintain records and risk assessments, and respond to incidents in line with safeguarding procedures.
Essential Requirements: At least 1 year of experience in a similar setting, strong safeguarding awareness, and ligature training. Desirable: Experience in Mental Health Secure settings.
summary:
Flexible residential support role in Leeds supporting young people in care.
Temporary shifts focused on safeguarding, routines and resilience-building.

title: Youth Residential Support Worker
description:
This role supports young people aged 12-17 in residential homes, helping create stability, promote independence and maintain a safe, nurturing environment.
It is ad-hoc temporary work suited to those wanting flexible shifts while making a meaningful impact.
Key Details: Leeds locations, £14.82 per hour with uplifts for waking nights and weekends, with earlies, lates, sleep-ins and waking nights available.
Requirements: Ligature training, at least 1 year of relevant residential childcare or youth support experience, strong safeguarding awareness and confidence supporting challenging behaviour.
Desirable: Mental Health Secure experience or behavioural management training.
summary:
Youth residential support role in Leeds working with children in care.
Flexible shifts focused on stability, safety and daily support.

title: Residential Childcare Support Worker
description:
Shift pattern is ad-hoc cover on a sessional or casual basis.
This Leeds role covers waking night residential childcare shifts as required across services.
Salary £12.29 per hour with flexible working availability.
You will support children and young people in residential settings, ensuring safety, routine and consistent care during overnight periods.
summary:
Casual waking night childcare support role in Leeds.
Flexible cover shifts supporting residential services.

title: Assistant Residential Support Worker
description:
This is a single-site adult residential support role on a rota-based schedule starting at £13.50 per hour.
You will support adults with mental health challenges and learning disabilities, helping them live safely and independently.
Key responsibilities include supporting routines, encouraging community involvement, monitoring wellbeing and maintaining accurate records.
Requirements include relevant experience, a full UK driving licence with access to a vehicle, rota flexibility and enhanced DBS.
Desirable: Level 3 Health and Social Care or willingness to work towards it.
summary:
Adult residential support role in Halifax supporting independence and wellbeing.
Structured rota role with consistent client support responsibilities.

title: Complex Care Assistant
description:
This Pudsey complex care role pays £15 per hour including holiday pay.
A permanent contract is available after successful probation.
Applicants must have the right to work in the UK, be a driver with access to a car and meet specific client-care requirements.
The role is open to female applicants only under the Equality Act 2010 due to care needs.
summary:
Complex care role in Pudsey supporting specific client needs.
Driver required with progression to permanent contract.

title: Care Assistant
description:
This Wakefield role focuses on practical help, companionship and supporting clients to remain independent at home.
You will provide personalised care that helps individuals feel safe, supported and able to maintain quality of life.
The role offers full training and ongoing development.
No prior experience is required if you are willing to complete training including First Aid and DBS checks.
Please note that sponsorship is not available.
summary:
Community care role in Wakefield supporting independent living.
Permanent position with training and clear salary range.
